ARBITRATION ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Aug-17-2006 Off Calendar

Minor'S Compromise In Scd.
Off Calendar Aug-10-2006 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled for Minors' Compromise hearing this day.
Comm. Sue Kaplan, Clerk: S. Ravinantapricha, CSR: Joyce Long.
Atty. Atty. David J. Farling, Esq. for Petitioner: Ignacio Garcia, present as Guardian at litem for: Javier de Jesus Garcia

On the basis of evidence received, the Petition is granted and compromise is approved.
Settlement amount - $2,500.00
Atty. fees- $ 524.28
Costs - $ 402.88
A net balance for of $1,572.84, to be deposited in a blocked account with Bank of America (4098 24th Street, San Francisco, CA 94114).
Orders Approving Compromise of Claim and Order to Deposit Money into Blocked Account signed in open court.
